success.description: Doktor Festus injects his foul-smelling poisons into the subject of his experiment. Each time a recharge token is removed from this action, the target suffers 1 fatigue
As above, and when this action recharges the target must make a Disease check with a difficulty equal to the amount of fatigue he suffered during this action

boon.description: The target gains a temporary insanity with the Chaos or Trauma trait. Each time a recharge token is removed from this card, add a tracking token to this insanity

challenge.description: Special: Reduce the difficulty modifier by if the target is securely restrained. this action completely recharges as soon as Doktor Festus disengages from the target, makes an attack, or uses an Active Defence

reckless.name: Dark Experiment
reckless.requirements: Engaged with target. You must have a variety of depraved medical tools at hand

success.description: You inject your foul-smelling poisons into the subject of your experiment. Each time a recharge token is removed from this action, the target suffers 1 fatigue
As above, and when this action recharges the target must make a Resilience (To) check with a difficulty equal to the amount of fatigue he suffered during this action to resist corruption

boon.description: The target gains a temporary insanity with the Chaos or Trauma trait. Each time a recharge token is removed from this card, add a tracking token to this insanity

challenge.description: Special: Reduce the difficulty modifier by if the target is securely restrained. This action completely recharges as soon as you disengage from the target, make an attack, or use an Active Defence
